prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年新疆大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约72944名、73456名、71818名、83093名、89643名，整体呈现持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约17825名，2025年基准位次约89643名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021年344人、2022年363人、2023年343人、2024年354人、2025年379人，2026年计划449人，较2025年扩招约18.5%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争格局产生显著影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 新疆大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第131名，近年排名在127–163名之间波动，整体处于中下游211水平；该校在声誉评价文件中未被收录，近年无明显重大负面或正面舆情事件；抖音热度排名第72，评价为'一般'，综合热度约38万，短视频平台关注度处于中等偏低水平，未出现报考热度异常信号；第五轮学科评估中新；该校作为综合性大学，学科覆盖面较广但顶尖学科较少。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业持续高热推荐，法学、汉语言文学等文科专业偏热，土木建筑、生化环材等专业明显劝退；山东省2026年高考报名总人数约72万人（综合类），较2025年约68.1万人增加约5.7%，考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；新疆大学位于新疆乌鲁木齐市，属于西部偏远地区高校，对东部沿海省份山东考生的地域吸引力相对有限；该校在山东省招生计划逐年增加，2026年计划449人，占该校在山东招生规模较大比例，但跨省就读的意愿受地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招约18.5%使竞争结构变化、山东省考生总数增长约5.7%加剧竞争，以及该校作为西部211的地域吸引力一般等因素，考虑考生规模增长带来的竞争加剧效应，预测2026年最低录取位次约99077名，区间98577–99577名。

- 计算机科学与技术（国家级一流本科专业）
- 法学（国家级一流本科专业；教育部卓越法律人才教育培养基地）
- 电子信息工程（国家级一流本科专业）
- 法学（涉外法治人才方向）。

- 信息安全（国家级一流本科专业）

- 数学与应用数学（理科基地班，国家级一流本科专业）

- 新闻传播学类（广告学、新闻学，国家级一流本科专业）

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约99077名，区间98577–99577名。建议位次在预测区间内的考生以二档专业为主力选择（如自动化、通信工程、信息安全、数据科学与大数据技术等工科热门专业），一档专业（电气工程及其自动化联合培养、计算机科学与技术、法学等）可作为冲刺目标；位次明显优于区间下限（98577名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限的考生应以三档专业保底，同时关注二档中位次相对靠后的专业（如新闻传播学类、英语、工商管理类等）。新疆大学作为211高校，在山东省招生计划较大，整体录取位次呈后移趋势，报考性价比相对提升。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Xinjiang University in Shandong Province comprehensive category were approximately 72944, 73456, 71818, 83093, and 89643 respectively, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 17825 places in the past 3 years, and a baseline ranking of about 89643 in 2025; the enrollment plan for comprehensive category in Shandong Province was 344 in 2021, 363 in 2022, 343 in 2023, 354 in 2024, 379 in 2025, and 449 in 2026, an increase of about 18.5% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that significantly impacts the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xinjiang University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings is about 131st in 2026, fluctuating between 127th and 163rd in recent years, overall at a mid-to-low level among 211 universities; the university is not included in reputation evaluation documents, and there have been no significant negative or positive public opinion events in recent years; its Douyin popularity ranking is 72nd, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of about 380,000, indicating a moderately low level of attention on short video platforms, with no abnormal signals in application popularity; the fifth round of discipline evaluation is new; as a comprehensive university, it has a wide range of disciplines but few top-tier disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, while liberal arts majors like Law and Chinese Language and Literature are relatively hot, and majors like Civil Engineering, Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are clearly discouraged; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Shandong Province college entrance examination is about 720,000 (comprehensive category), an increase of about 5.7% compared to about 681,000 in 2025, intensifying overall competition; Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, Xinjiang, a remote western region university, with relatively limited regional appeal to candidates from the eastern coastal province of Shandong; the university's enrollment plan in Shandong Province has been increasing year by year, with 449 places in 2026, accounting for a large proportion of the university's enrollment in Shandong, but the willingness to study across provinces is affected by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion of about 18.5% in 2026 changing the competition structure, the increase in the number of candidates in Shandong Province by about 5.7% intensifying competition, and the generally limited regional appeal of this western 211 university, taking into account the intensified competition effect from the growth in candidate numbers, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 99077, with a range of 98577–99577.

- Computer Science and Technology (National First-Class Undergraduate Program)
- Law (National First-Class Undergraduate Program; Ministry of Education Outstanding Legal Talent Education and Training Base)
- Electronic Information Engineering (National First-Class Undergraduate Program)
- Law (International Legal Talent Direction).

- Automation (National First-Class Undergraduate Program)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 99077, with a range of 98577–99577. It is recommended that candidates within the predicted ranking range choose Tier 2 majors as the main options (such as Automation, Communication Engineering, Information Security, Data Science and Big Data Technology, etc.), while Tier 1 majors (Electrical Engineering and Automation joint training, Computer Science and Technology, Law, etc.) can be used as reach targets; candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 98577) can focus on reaching for top Tier 1 majors; candidates with rankings close to the upper limit should use Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also considering Tier 2 majors with relatively lower rankings (such as Journalism and Communication, English, Business Administration, etc.). As a 211 university, Xinjiang University has a large enrollment plan in Shandong Province, and the overall admission ranking shows a backward trend, making the application cost-effectiveness relatively improved.
